643e0e8d5926d80753f00577.leadin_sanitized: Oh god, I have an essay on the European Union due in tomorrow. Anyways, for 10 points each answer some questions about the European Union:
parts: What was the three word name of the organisation that preceded the European Union? It was created via the Treaty of Rome in 1957 and was officially replaced by the EU under the Maastricht Treaty.

What is the name of the current President of the European Commission? She is the first woman to hold the office, and she shares her first name with an American science fiction author who wrote ‘The Dispossessed’.

Von Der Leyens election to the Presidency of the Commission was controversial as she did not hold this position. The European Parliaments preferred choice for the Presidency is this position, which Jean-Claude Juncker held when he was elected in 2014.
parts_sanitized: What was the three word name of the organisation that preceded the European Union? It was created via the Treaty of Rome in 1957 and was officially replaced by the EU under the Maastricht Treaty.

What is the name of the current President of the European Commission? She is the first woman to hold the office, and she shares her first name with an American science fiction author who wrote 'The Dispossessed'.

Von Der Leyens election to the Presidency of the Commission was controversial as she did not hold this position. The European Parliaments preferred choice for the Presidency is this position, which Jean-Claude Juncker held when he was elected in 2014.
answers_sanitized: European Economic Community [accept European Community, EEC, or EC]

set.name: 2023 Politics & History with a side of Memes
